prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `973e499e`.
codex_response:
Implemented `973e499e` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: for each nonzero input color, stamp that color’s full input mask into every output block whose source cell has that color, producing an `n^2 x n^2` self-referential expansion. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint because it matched the official examples; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry for this task.

The verifier is in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_973e499e/verifier.py), the generator is in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_973e499e/generator.py), and exports are in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_973e499e/__init__.py). No new shared primitive was needed. The generator builds small square multi-color inputs with repeated-color disconnected components, which matches the official family better than pure single-blob partitions.

Validation passed end to end: `5/5` official examples via `arc2.shared.verify`, then `1000/1000` generated examples via `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 973e499e`. Generated outputs are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/973e499e/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/973e499e/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/973e499e/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/973e499e/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/973e499e/previews/preview_03.png).
